title: Add beginner-friendly chat-only development workflow documentation
scope: Create docs/using-chat-only-workflow.md with a step-by-step guide for new contributors
Document prerequisites, required scripts, and full patch validation flow
Record the documentation update in CHANGELOG.md
acceptance_criteria: A new docs/using-chat-only-workflow.md file exists with end-to-end, beginner-focused instructions
The workflow includes workorder creation, packet creation, patch extraction, validation, and verification
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Documentation may drift if script interfaces change and docs are not updated
rollback_plan: Revert docs/using-chat-only-workflow.md and CHANGELOG.md changes for this work order
